creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
On __freshly__ installed 10.1 i386 system, when running gucharmap installed with pkg:

process 1501: D-Bus library appears to be incorrectly set up; failed to read machine uuid: Failed to open "/etc/machine-id": No such file or directory
See the manual page for dbus-uuidgen to correct this issue.
  D-Bus not compiled with backtrace support so unable to print a backtrace
Abort trap (core dumped)

This fixes if dbus service is started at least once.
